summary: A first‑time fan recounts the sensory overload of a GA lawn show, but provides no details on the recording itself.
review: The reviewer was 16 and attended their very first Grateful Dead concert, describing it as an overwhelming and thrilling experience that left them eager to return. No comments were made about the audio source, mix quality, or performance specifics, so the technical merits of this recording remain unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single, experience‑focused review is available; it expresses enthusiasm for the show but gives no information on musical or recording quality, leading to a moderate rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention any aspects of sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
